description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a smooth, light brown leather or leather-like material. The sofa features three main seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, with an extended chaise section on the right side for lounging. The armrests are straight, padded, and rise to the same height as the backrest, providing a clean, boxy silhouette. The legs are short, block-style, and appear to be made of dark metal or wood, slightly recessed for a floating effect. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, with no visible decorative stitching or tufting. This sofa would be well-suited for urban environments such as apartment lobbies, modern living rooms, or stylish waiting areas.
description: A contemporary L-shaped sectional sofa in light brown leather with straight padded armrests, three seat and back cushions, and a right-side chaise. The design is minimalist with short, recessed block legs and a smooth, unadorned surface.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full L-shape, three seat and back cushions, and the right-side chaise extension.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise and the straight, padded armrest profile.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, smooth backrest and the uniform height of the armrests and back.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the sectional layout and the clean, boxy lines of the sofa.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual seat cushions and three matching backrest cushions, all uniform in size and shape, with a sectional chaise extension; cushions appear loose but well-fitted.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests present on both ends, rising to the same height as the backrest, with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Short, block-style legs, likely made of dark metal or wood, positioned at the corners and slightly recessed for a floating appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three individual, loose cushions; no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light brown color with a smooth, untextured leather or leather-like finish; no visible patterns, tufting, or decorative stitching.
